about.title: About Mavingue
about.description: Leader in construction materials in Mozambique, now digitized to offer full control over your purchases, water consumption and payments.
about.historyText: Mavingue was born with the purpose of providing high-quality construction materials for residential, commercial and industrial projects in Mozambique. With years of experience in the market, we have become a reference in the sector. Today, we take a step further by digitizing our services, offering our clients a modern platform to manage purchases, water consumption and payments simply and efficiently.
about.missionText: Provide quality construction materials with excellence in service, coupled with digital innovation to facilitate project management and domestic consumption.
about.visionText: To be a reference in Mozambique in the integration between civil construction and technology, offering complete solutions for clients and partners.
about.valuesText: Quality, transparency, innovation, commitment to deadlines and client satisfaction.
about.cta: Join the new era of construction in Mozambique
about.ctaDesc: Create your account and have full control over your purchases, water consumption and payments.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are available to clarify doubts, receive suggestions and support our clients.
contact.supportDesc: For questions related to purchases, invoices or water management, use the digital platform or contact our support.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Learn about Mavingue's projects. We will soon make the complete portfolio available.
projects.comingSoonDesc: We are organizing our project portfolio to present soon.

order.question: How can I place an order?
order.answer: You can place your order directly through our online catalog. Simply select the desired products, add to cart and follow the steps to complete the purchase. You can also contact our team for personalized assistance.

payment.question: What payment methods are available?
payment.answer: We accept multiple payment methods: M-PESA, credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), and bank transfer. All payments are processed securely on our platform.

delivery.question: What is the delivery timeframe?
delivery.answer: Delivery time varies according to location and product availability. In Maputo, delivery is usually made in 2-5 business days. For other provinces, the timeframe can be 5-10 business days.

returns.question: Can I return or exchange products?
returns.answer: Yes, we accept returns up to 14 days after delivery, provided the product is in original condition. Contact us to initiate the return or exchange process.

freeDelivery.question: Do you offer free delivery?
freeDelivery.answer: We offer free delivery for orders above 5,000 MT within Maputo. For smaller orders or deliveries outside Maputo, variable delivery fees apply.

tracking.question: How can I track my order?
tracking.answer: After order confirmation, you will receive a tracking code by email. You can also track your order status in the 'My Orders' section of your account.

business.question: Do you sell to professionals and companies?
business.answer: Yes, we have special conditions for business clients, including bulk prices, personalized payment terms and dedicated project management. Contact us for more information.

support.question: How can I contact customer support?
support.answer: You can contact us via email at info@mavingue.co.mz, by phone at +258 84/85 000 0000, or through the digital platform. Our team is available from 7h00 to 18h00, Monday to Saturday.

footer.aboutText: Leader in construction materials in Mozambique. Quality, trust and innovation for your projects.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.accountResponsibility: When creating an account, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities under your account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts at our discretion.
terms.fraudCancelation: We reserve the right to cancel orders in case of fraud
terms.contentOwnership: All content on this site, including text, images, logos and design, is the property of Mavingue or its licensors and is protected by copyright and registered trademarks.
terms.liabilityDisclaimer: We do not guarantee that the site is always available or error-free. We will not be liable for any indirect, incidental or consequential damages resulting from the use of the site.
terms.changesNotice: We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page and will take effect immediately upon publication.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataUsage: Your data is used to process orders, improve our services, communicate with you and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.contactUs: For questions about this policy or to exercise your rights, contact us at privacidade@mavingue.co.mz or by phone at +258 84 000 0000
